chief_complaint: A 74-year-old female patient presented with angina pectoris and left bundle branch block syndrome.
history: The patient exhibited classic features of rate-dependent LBBB accompanied by angina pectoris. Comprehensive diagnostic evaluations revealed no evidence of obstructive coronary artery disease.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are provided in the case report.
labs: ECG showed left bundle branch block, but no other specific laboratory or imaging results are provided.
correct_diagnosis: Painful left bundle branch block syndrome
differentials: Painful left bundle branch block syndrome
correct_ranking: Painful left bundle branch block syndrome
